scripts.compose:compact: npm run timeline:compact && REVPILOT_TIMELINE=timeline-compact.json REVPILOT_MASTER_NAME=RevPilot_demo_V4_sans_blancs.mp4 REVPILOT_SHARE_NAME=RevPilot_demo_V4_sans_blancs_partage.mp4 REVPILOT_THUMBNAIL_NAME=RevPilot_demo_V4_sans_blancs_miniature.png REVPILOT_STATE_NAME=RevPilot_demo_V4_sans_blancs_etat.json REVPILOT_AUDIO_BED=1 REVPILOT_AUDIO_TEMPO=0.94 node scripts/compose-video.mjs
scripts.build: npm run validate:timeline && npm run capture && npm run compose && npm run validate:output
scripts.build:local: npm run validate:timeline && npm run voice:local && npm run compose && npm run validate:output
